_comment: Hand-curation from the trio (Alex, broad strokes) that the clustering pass can't derive — title-only songs whose hook never appears in the sung lyric, and merges of separately-clustered takes into one canonical whistlegraph. Applied by gen-model.mjs after clustering. renames: code -> canonical title. merges: sourceCode -> targetCode (source's posts retag to the target, source work drops out; old /sourceCode falls back to the index).
